item.title: NizaarKinsella: Nizaar Kinsella @NizaarKinsella · 3min Chelsea co-owner Behdad Eghbali’s conference appearance was planned since autumn.
item.description:
Nizaar Kinsella @NizaarKinsella · 3min Chelsea co-owner Behdad Eghbali’s conference appearance was planned since autumn. It's the first time this ownership showed humility and accepted certain criticisms.
Still, a protest tomorrow will still hammer home dissatisfaction before Man United. De bbc.co.uk 4 2 53 1 mil

item.description:
indykaila News reposteó indykaila News @indykaila · 2h **SHOCKING NEWCASTLE BOMBSHELL JUST DROPPED!**
We just got our hands on the **HUGE** summer transfer news.
Our insider partners have **OFFICIALLY** given us the green light to blow the lid off this MASSIVE story at **8PM TONIGHT**! Newcastle United 105 51 590 100 mil
